<strong>Lacosamide</strong> 目前有 <strong>27 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 10 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Lacosamide 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Lacosamide UCB is indicated as monotherapy and adjunctive therapy in the treatment of partial-onset seizures with or without secondary generalisation in adults, adolescents and children from 4 years...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>manic bipolar affective disorder（100.0%）</li>
<li>Tourette syndrome（100.0%）</li>
<li>trichotillomania（99.9%）</li>
<li>nephrogenic syndrome of inappropriate antidiuresis（99.9%）</li>
<li>migraine disorder（99.9%）</li>
<li>insomnia (disease)（99.8%）</li>
<li>migraine with brainstem aura（99.8%）</li>
<li>myofascial pain syndrome（99.8%）</li>
<li>obsessive-compulsive disorder（99.8%）</li>
<li>papillary conjunctivitis（99.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/lacosamide/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
